tasks.subject: Task 1: Extract shared predicates to types.nix
tasks.description: Consolidate isParametricWrapper, isSubmoduleFn, isMeaningfulName into single exports from types.nix. Import in aspect.nix, transition.nix, include.nix.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Extract normalizeRoot helper
tasks.description: Deduplicate root normalization logic between default.nix and has-aspect.nix into a shared normalizeRoot function. Note: has-aspect.nix currently skips module fn detection; normalizeRoot adds it.

acceptanceCriteria: Both fxResolveTree and collectPathSet use it

tasks.subject: Task 3: Efficiency fixes
tasks.description: Convert structuralKeys to attrset lookup, use lib.partition in drain-deferred, guard empty registry, remove dead paths list.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Decompose forward.nix
tasks.description: Split 190-line forwardItem into mkDirectForward, mkAdapterForward, mkTopLevelAdapter. Fix inherit style.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Decompose transition.nix
tasks.description: Extract emitCrossProvider and resolveFanOut as top-level helpers from 143-line resolveTransition.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Decompose aspect.nix
tasks.description: Extract mkPositionalInclude, mkNamedInclude from emitSelfProvide. Extract resolveParametric from aspectToEffect. Remove forwardWrap identity.

tasks.subject: Task 7: Decompose include.nix wrapChild + types.nix providerType.merge
tasks.description: Split wrapChild into wrapFunctorChild/wrapBareFn. Split providerType.merge into mergeParametrics/mergeMixed/mergeFunctions.

tasks.subject: Task 8: Legacy cleanup (batteries WSL comment)
tasks.description: Add clarifying comment to WSL policy explaining why it doesn't use mkDetectHost. Deprecation warnings kept intentionally.
